subject: REVISED M5: Fix UI-API Contract (Add fail_reason)
description:
CRITICAL FIX: API has fail_reason field but UI types don't include it. Also need to ensure UI calls correct endpoint.

APPROACH:
1. Update apps/ui/src/types/api.ts to include fail_reason
2. Verify apps/ui/src/lib/api.ts calls /rag/query correctly
3. Update AnswerDisplay and AbstainDisplay components
4. Ensure CitationLink works with evidence spans

ACCEPTANCE:
- TypeScript types match API exactly (including fail_reason)
- UI calls correct RAG endpoint
- AnswerDisplay shows statements + citations
- AbstainDisplay shows abstain_reason AND fail_reason
- CitationLink navigates to evidence
